case_title: CLEO CUMMINGS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. 506 PLAINTIFF CLEO CUMMINGS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN & CHRIS BUCK, CLAIMS INVESTIGATOR & URBAN FORESTER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-09-2018 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO SEP-18-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF CLEO CUMMINGS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT DECLINE STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CUMMINGS, CLEO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,450.00, $2400 PLUS COSTS FOR THE REASONS STATED IN THE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,800.00 FILED BY CUMMINGS, CLEO AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-09-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-18-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
